title: East and Central Africa Liberation
description: Quiz on the independence movements in British East Africa, Belgian Congo, Rwanda, and Burundi.

questions.question: In what year did Tanganyika win its independence under Julius Nyerere?
What was the name of the political party that led Tanganyika to independence?
In what year did Uganda attain independence under Milton Obote?
What was the name of the revolt organised by dispossessed Kenyan peasants between 1952 and 1955?
Who became Kenya's first president at independence in 1963?
When did the Belgian Congo achieve independence?
Who was the first Prime Minister of the independent Republic of the Congo?
On what date was Patrice Lumumba executed?
Which province attempted to secede from the Congo shortly after independence?
In what year did Rwanda and Burundi become independent?
